title: Vertical High-End Fashion Campaign Poster
sourceTitle: Mirror Reflection Luxury Fashion Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 high-end fashion campaign poster for Vellum Atelier, featuring sculptural pearl perfume campaign with Main title: Main Title Subtitle: Subtitle Color palette: Main Colors Outfit: Outfit Style Accessories / props: Accessories Or Props Scene: Scene Action: Model Action as the main serif headline. Subject: An adult woman with realistic skin texture and refined styling wears Main title: Main Title Subtitle: Subtitle Color palette: Main Colors Outfit: Outfit Style Accessories / props: Accessories Or Props Scene: Scene Action: Model Action Style: premium, elegant, retro-luxury, editorial, interacts with amber perfume bottle and gold earrings, and performs adjusting one earring while looking into the mirror through a mirror reflection. Scene: warm hotel vanity mirror suite provides the campaign setting while the fixed mirror composition, blurred foreground, soft light leaks, warm retro tones, fabric texture, and subtle reflections stay consistent. Composition: Fixed mirror-based composition: model appears through the reflection, blurred foreground creates depth, large serif headline sits in the lower-middle area, small editorial text at top, and small CTA or season text at bottom. Signature Elements: Mirror reflection, blurred foreground, soft light leaks, warm retro tones, elegant adult model pose, realistic fabric texture, subtle reflections, and luxury campaign typography. Fixed source details: Outfit Style: ivory silk slip dress. Style: Premium elegant retro-luxury fashion campaign, editorial magazine-style poster, cinematic soft-focus photography, realistic fabric, polished luxury styling, and refined commercial finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm retro luxury tones with creamy neutrals, soft amber light leaks, gentle shadows, and restrained metallic highlights; Lighting: Soft cinematic campaign lighting with mirror glow, subtle reflection highlights, warm light leaks, realistic skin and fabric detail, and polished depth. Typography: Main title: Main Title Subtitle: Subtitle Color palette: Main Colors Outfit: Outfit Style Accessories / props: Accessories Or Props Scene: Scene Action: Model Action appears as the large lower-middle serif headline; REFLECTIONS OF SCENT appears as the short secondary line; Vellum Atelier stays clean and magazine-like in the editorial header or footer. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:

Theme: Vertical 9:16 high-end fashion campaign poster for Noir Assembly, featuring black evening coat launch with AFTER DARK as the main serif headline. Subject: An adult woman with realistic skin texture and refined styling wears Main title: Main Title Subtitle: Subtitle Color palette: Main Colors Outfit: Outfit Style Accessories / props: Accessories Or Props Scene: Scene Action: Model Action Style: premium, elegant, retro-luxury, editorial, interacts with silver clutch and smoky sunglasses, and performs fixing hair beside the mirror through a mirror reflection. Scene: dim Art Deco lobby mirror provides the campaign setting while the fixed mirror composition, blurred foreground, soft light leaks, warm retro tones, fabric texture, and subtle reflections stay consistent. Composition: Fixed mirror-based composition: model appears through the reflection, blurred foreground creates depth, large serif headline sits in the lower-middle area, small editorial text at top, and small CTA or season text at bottom. Signature Elements: Mirror reflection, blurred foreground, soft light leaks, warm retro tones, elegant adult model pose, realistic fabric texture, subtle reflections, and luxury campaign typography. Fixed source details: Outfit Style: tailored black coat with silk gloves. Style: Premium elegant retro-luxury fashion campaign, editorial magazine-style poster, cinematic soft-focus photography, realistic fabric, polished luxury styling, and refined commercial finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm retro luxury tones with creamy neutrals, soft amber light leaks, gentle shadows, and restrained metallic highlights; Lighting: Soft cinematic campaign lighting with mirror glow, subtle reflection highlights, warm light leaks, realistic skin and fabric detail, and polished depth. Typography: AFTER DARK appears as the large lower-middle serif headline; CITY REFLECTION appears as the short secondary line; Noir Assembly stays clean and magazine-like in the editorial header or footer. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
